title: Simple Item Frames
description: Simplifies item frame model, can reduce FPS drops caused by Item Frames.
body:
Attempts to optimize the game by making item frames render with 1 shape instead of 5. Making the frame of the item frame flat with the middle part instead of extruded outwards.

If you are here for performance improvements, combine this with [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)

Without:
![Picture showing item frames types, with wooden frame extruded up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ab4f360e1f9dc0d1d2e3bccd603ac5cdc542dea.png)
With:
![Picture showing item frames types, with wooden frame flat with middle part](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f93bc52db3edb1079691a006247625058ce751b.png)

Original by u/RandomIntel: https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/5x3im6/i_updated_simple_item_frames_for_all_the_versions/

Updated to 1.16.4 by u/hazzeFox: https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/lhfagg/i_updated_randomintels_simple_item_frames/

Updated to 1.21.4 by me (Cobwebblocks): Adds glow item frame and changes resource pack version to match game version
